failures.description: The agent planned the catalog search with available_only=false despite the request requiring only available products.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. At index 1, the agent had enough information to plan a search restricted to available products, but instead set available_only to false and explicitly planned to include unavailable products. This violates a key user constraint due to misunderstanding the intent. The later answer happens to be correct because the cheapest overall item is also available, but the incorrect constraint was never corrected.
